content: MutationObserver/listener leaks in SPAs happen when re-attachment logic on route change doesn't disconnect/remove the previous observer or listeners first -- each navigation adds one more, so after N route changes the same event fires N times. disconnect() on a single MutationObserver stops observation of ALL observed nodes at once (no per-node unobserve), so 'observe once per element' patterns need explicit bookkeeping to avoid re-observing already-tracked nodes.
